context: Tests whether the agent correctly migrates raw manifests to Helm by parameterising names with helpers, extracting values, applying label patterns, using toYaml for complex objects, setting resource limits, avoiding hardcoded image tags, and documenting a proper validation workflow.

checklist.name: Helper used for name
checklist.description: The Helm deployment template uses {{ include "<chart>.fullname" . }} or equivalent helper for the resource name — NOT the hardcoded string 'notification-service'

checklist.name: Standard labels helper
checklist.description: At least one template uses {{ include "<chart>.labels" . }} or equivalent named template for labels, rather than manually listing app: label only

checklist.name: Helpers tpl exists
checklist.description: _helpers.tpl exists and defines at least a fullname and labels named template

checklist.name: No hardcoded image tag
checklist.description: values.yaml image tag is empty string or uses appVersion as fallback — NOT 'v3.0.1' or 'latest'

checklist.name: Secret extracted to values
checklist.description: The SMTP_PASSWORD or equivalent secret value is NOT hardcoded in the template; it is either moved to a values.yaml key or referenced via a Kubernetes Secret

checklist.name: Resources block added
checklist.description: The Helm deployment template includes a resources: block that was absent in the original raw manifest

checklist.name: validate.sh has helm template
checklist.description: validate.sh contains a 'helm template' command (not just helm lint)

checklist.name: validate.sh has kubeval or kubeconform
checklist.description: validate.sh pipes helm template output to kubeval or kubeconform for schema validation

checklist.name: toYaml or nindent used
checklist.description: At least one template uses toYaml or nindent when rendering a complex value (labels, annotations, env, or similar)

checklist.name: Values extracted
checklist.description: At least replica count and image repository are extracted into values.yaml as configurable keys rather than hardcoded in the template
